algorithmDescription.byteBands: Within each collection and feature class, sort by bytes then UTF-8 path and assign floor(index * 4 / count).
algorithmDescription.stratumPathOrder: SHA-256("cloudflare-mdx-scale-v1" + NUL + relativePath), with UTF-8 path as the tie-breaker.
algorithmDescription.scheduler: At each level choose the collection or stratum with the greatest ((next selected total * capacity / total capacity) - already selected) deficit; ties use frozen order.
algorithmDescription.prefixRecordFormat: relativePath + NUL + sourceSha256 + NUL + bytes + LF
